base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_tourian — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 metroid. Tourian zone atlas — final zone. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Tourian zone atlas — final zone; blue-gray futuristic Space-Pirate base. Includes 3-state Mother-Brain-room background variants: 1=when shot, 2=when dies, 3=after death
